reviews.review_description: I wanted mods on th real gorilla tag but I found this game with gtag mods IT IS SO FUN YOU BASICALLY GET GTAG MOD FOR FREE IN THIS GAME 1 STAR REVIEWS ARE FAKE THEY ARE HATERS but pls be careful on how you use the mods bc you may get banned

Pretty good and fun game but there are a ton of fly tatters in infection and nothing happened. Also the report function does not really do anything from what I have seen. Overall this is a pretty good fan game and I would recommend it. Just watch out for the flying gorillas in infection!
